title: The Art of Tea Blending
content: The Whispering Leaf tea shop has been at the heart of Springtown for four generations. Hana, the current owner, continues her grandmother's tradition of creating mood-specific tea blends. Known blends include 'Sunset Calm' (chamomile, lavender, honey), 'Morning Courage' (black tea, cinnamon, ginger), 'Starlight Dreams' (white tea, jasmine, valerian), 'Heart's Ease' (rose, hibiscus, lemon balm), and 'Pathfinder's Blend' (green tea, mint, ginger) - created the year Hana's grandmother decided to make Springtown her home. The shop serves as an informal gathering place where townspeople share stories and seek comfort. Sakura brings fresh flowers every Tuesday. Mio's grandmother planned the first festivals at the shop's central table. Hana harbors a dream of expanding the shop into a proper inn for travelers.
